hooks.command: sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); guard="$root/scripts/agent-hooks/block-env.mjs"; if [ ! -f "$guard" ]; then echo "Blocked: repository secret guard not found" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec node "$guard"'

sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); guard="$root/scripts/agent-hooks/docs-guard.mjs"; if [ ! -f "$guard" ]; then echo "Blocked: repository docs guard not found" >&2; exit 2; fi; exec node "$guard"'
sh -c 'script="$HOME/.claude/scripts/notify.sh"; [ ! -f "$script" ] || exec bash "$script" "🔔 [Knowledge Hub] Codex" "Need approval"'
sh -c 'script="$HOME/.claude/scripts/notify.sh"; [ ! -f "$script" ] || exec bash "$script" "✅ [Knowledge Hub] Codex" "Task completed"'
